Churn Reason Notes:
The budget cuts are a combination of NIH-related and reduced spending with higher education as a whole.

Faculty and departments are prioritizing their spending and choosing what to cut.  

UC has also moved to a new budgeting model for the next FY that has a lot of colleges taking a stark look at their spending as a whole.

AHC has had massive budget cuts for all software offerings.

The combined license has more than half of the users from the College of Medicine, which was previously on a chargeback license.

The Pharmacy and COM groups provided a low renewal response.
